/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmainspace__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libmainspace__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mainspace/msg/detail/to_stm_speed__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mainspace/msg/detail/position__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mainspace/msg/detail/desk__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mainspace/msg/detail/coffee__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mainspace/msg/detail/csv_file__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mainspace/msg/detail/command__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mainspace/msg/detail/pause__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
